71.939701016309*hdd_18c - 176.923272451359*is_night - 0.0545793986713577*load_lag_24 - 16931.598161083*sin(1.27318055294082*hour_sin - 8.25247768338519) - 14110.2715293887*sin(1.395577780113*hour_sin + 7.40500661021315) - 1085.73979630527*Abs(10.514399170087*hour_cos + 3.01836808562186) + 863.827175106866*Abs(13.4568293215443*hour_cos + 3.83600670604008) + 23.248116714908*Abs(14.3214448906097*month_cos - 3.45614166444062) + 188.17352312984*Abs(113.594870169181*sin(0.264025240076916*hour_sin + 1.78991141740091) + 0.661243027294631*Abs(0.431950558135207*hdd_18c - 8.07750205307964) + 0.473302994054166*Abs(5.86132354868884*hour_cos - 6.32593593816082) + 0.0892024965483529*Abs(0.000809505211335226*load_lag_12 - 28.9787954766072) - 113.285903530634) - 1835.53035621104
